raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Recent pace shift","name":"What’s changed in your day-to-day over the last few weeks that’s affecting your pace?","description":"Surfaces concrete changes behind slower reviews and thinner commits without assuming the cause.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Workload bottleneck","name":"What part of your current work is taking longer than it should?","description":"Identifies the specific step or task creating drag in delivery.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Sustainable load","name":"What would make this workload feel sustainable for you right now?","description":"Surfaces what needs to change to keep pace healthy over time.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"PR review drag","name":"Where do PR reviews tend to slow down for you?","description":"Finds the point of friction in the review cycle, whether technical, social, or process-related.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Design-system fallout","name":"How did the design-system rework land for you?","description":"Opens the door to hear his side of the friction and its effect on motivation or trust.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recognition gap","name":"What kind of recognition has felt missing lately?","description":"Checks whether his contributions are being seen in the way that matters to him.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ownership shift","name":"What parts of the work have you been choosing to lean into lately?","description":"Looks for signs of initiative and ownership without making it a compliment check.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback use","name":"What did you take from the feedback on that PR?","description":"Surfaces how he processes review feedback and whether it is helping him improve.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Learning edge","name":"What feels like the biggest stretch in your work right now?","description":"Finds the current learning edge and whether he is getting enough challenge.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What kind of support would make the next couple of weeks easier?","description":"Surfaces practical help that could remove friction without turning the meeting into a status check.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team friction","name":"What’s been harder than usual in working with the team?","description":"Gently probes whether interpersonal friction is affecting collaboration or confidence.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]}]}
